title: Lastrea tristis

intro: Lastrea tristis, also known as the Caledonian fir-leaved fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of the British Isles. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Bioactive constituents of Lastrea tristis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
